counting_rule: Families consolidate potentially derivative instances before any case identifier, finding code, or admission state is assigned.

families.label: Fracture implementation and readiness transition
families.review_question: Do partial implementation, proposed fixes, documentation, and release scaffolding concern the same version later described as complete, DAW-validated, distributable, or commercially ready?
not_claimed: that the plugin did not work
that no later complete version existed
that a Fork failure mode is established

families.label: Mock or illustrative artifact to sealed operational standing
families.review_question: Did a mock, illustration, dashboard, or stress-test package inherit operational or evidentiary standing through sealing language?
not_claimed: that symbolic sealing is inherently invalid
that the artifact lacked all useful content

families.label: Placeholder cryptography to verified commercial evidence
families.review_question: Was an output represented as cryptographically operative while the preserved implementation remained placeholder-bound?
not_claimed: that no operative implementation existed elsewhere
that a digest alone would prove truth or legality

families.label: Integrity evidence to legal, admissibility, or epistemic standing
families.review_question: Did integrity or anchoring evidence become truth, admissibility, or legal sufficiency without preserving intervening requirements and authority limits?
not_claimed: technical invalidity of the integrity mechanism

families.label: Proposed technology to deployed and adversarially validated standing
families.review_question: Did drafted sales or presentation language assert deployment and validation beyond the available execution record?
required_bindings: whether text was draft or publication
not_claimed: that the technology was never deployed
that draft marketing language is itself evidence of publication

families.label: Draft completion to board or governance authority
families.review_question: Was completion language promoted beyond the authority of the actor or artifact that supplied it?

families.label: Multi-agent agreement to truth or corroboration
families.review_question: Was repeated or cross-model agreement treated as independent corroboration without distinct evidence?

families.label: Architecture presence to live NPU or execution standing
families.review_question: Was an architectural description or component presence treated as evidence of live execution?

families.label: Biometric inference to pastoral action
families.review_question: Did an inference from biometric or behavioral data acquire action authority without preserved safeguards and human review?

families.label: Conceptual engineering to manufacturing readiness
families.review_question: Did a conceptual design, calculation set, or schematic-ready package acquire fabricated, verified, or manufacturing-ready standing?

families.label: Document-local ACTIVE designation to real deployment
families.review_question: Did an ACTIVE status inside a field manual, simulation, or doctrine document refer to document state or real operational deployment?

families.label: Generated quantum report to capability commitment
families.review_question: Was a simulated or generated report later treated as a measured or committed system capability?

families.label: Performance target to measured engineering fact
families.review_question: Was an estimated, designed, or targeted performance improvement represented as measured performance?

families.label: Explicit physical narrowing and correction
families.review_question: Does the preserved sequence demonstrate that an earlier continuous-power premise was later narrowed to an energy-harvesting system constrained by conservation of energy?
not_claimed: that the correction erases the earlier statement
that correction itself is a failure mode

families.label: Production-grade or market-ready opinion without bound transition
families.review_question: Is the statement merely commercial opinion, or is it bound to specific execution, validation, security, customer, or production representations?
